notes: SHIP v1.14.237 — FORGE PROVENANCE & TRUST (per FORGE-237-238-WORK-ORDER.md, Ship 1). Read/display-layer only; no Master writes. ⭐BIGGEST FIND — SHIPPED CSS BUG, PRE-EXISTING SINCE .233: the comment above the Forge token block contained the literal sequence star-slash inside `(:root/*/html,body/#stage/canvas)`. That CLOSED THE CSS COMMENT EARLY; the parser took the trailing prose as a selector, entered error recovery, and SWALLOWED THE NEXT RULE — which was `#forge3d-sheet{--fbg --cyan --vio --teal --gold --ink --dim}`. Proven in-browser: before the fix, getComputedStyle('#forge3d-sheet') returned --dim='' --teal='' and --gold=#ffd60a (the GLOBAL token, not Forge's #ffcb45); the rule was present in raw CSS but ABSENT from the parsed CSSOM. So EVERY Forge design token has been undefined inside the aisle since the day it shipped, and every token-colored HUD element silently fell back to inherited/global values. Fixed by rewording the comment; verified all four tokens now resolve (--dim #5a6b7d, --teal #1fffd0, --cyan #28e0ff, --gold #ffcb45). This also explains the 'unstyled badges' symptom and would have killed the new badge CSS below. (1) PROVENANCE — Forge never claims 'LIVE MASTER' again. All 3 'LIVE MASTER' strings removed (2 tagSub writers + the static markup default), replaced by deploy_forge_tagSub()/deploy_forge_siteLabel(). New deploy_forge_provenance() writes the sheet SUBTITLE (which until now read the stale lie 'STAGE 1 · SCENE PREVIEW'): 'DFW2 · dfw2.cwz · SAVED 07/09 09:33 · RESTORED FROM CACHE' for a boot-restored snapshot, or '… · LOADED <ts>' for a fresh in-session parse, or 'NO MASTER LOADED'. Deliberately placed in the subtitle, NOT the herotag — .sub is 9px inside an inline-flex box and would wrap over the scene. restoredFromStorage was VERIFIED trustworthy before use (exactly ONE writer, _phantom_master_bootRestore; the fresh-parse path never sets it) per the work order's instruction not to trust it silently. (2) SOURCE FILENAME persisted. phantom_parseMaster already received {filename: file.name} but discarded it; now carried on the site object and persisted by PHANTOM_MASTER_STORE.save as an ADDITIVE OPTIONAL field. schemaVersion STAYS 1 — load() validates only `schemaVersion !== 1`, so pre-.237 cached Masters keep restoring (a v2 bump would have REJECTED and effectively destroyed every cached Master). ⚠️ John's CURRENT cached snapshot predates this field, so it will honestly report 'source unknown' until re-imported — SITE + SAVED date still identify it. (3) PURGE CACHED MASTER (owner-requested): new master_purgeCached(), two-step confirm via phantomConfirmAsk, each step NAMING exactly what dies (site · source file · saved date · rack count) so a tech can never purge blind. Clears PHANTOM_MASTER_STORE, nulls window._lastPhantomMaster, re-renders. Field-verify status (phantom_node_status_v1) is deliberately NOT touched. Wired into the Master banner. (4) UNPLACED HOSTS SURFACED — Forge was the ONLY surface in the app that silently DROPPED RU-less hosts: master_rackToElevation has always returned `unplaced`, and deploy_forge_slots threw it away. Now cached in a parallel _unplacedCache (deploy_forge_slots keeps returning a plain Array — 8+ call sites index it) and rendered as a gold callout above the detail table, matching the app's existing law (master search's .master-unplaced; the mscope seeder's rack.notes). Loud console.warn too. (5) MISSING BADGE CSS — badgeHTML has emitted .status-racked/.status-pending since .234 but NEITHER had a CSS rule anywhere in the file (the only styled variant was .status-none, which nothing emits). Both rules shipped; verified racked=teal, pending=slate. DEVIATIONS (beyond the work order, both justified): (a) the CSS-comment fix above — it is the root cause of the badge symptom and would have made the new badge CSS dead on arrival; (b) Master-supplied hostnames are now escaped (_fesc) where the detail panel concatenates them into innerHTML — they are operator-imported spreadsheet text and were being trusted as markup. LEGACY: the Master banner is SHARED with the legacy house, so the provenance text and Purge button are BOTH redesign_isOn()-gated; ?legacy=1 stays byte-identical. All Forge work is body.rd-only. VERIFIED END-TO-END in Chrome before push: no-Master → 'NO MASTER LOADED'; restored → full provenance w/ RESTORED FROM CACHE; fresh → LOADED; unplaced → gold callout naming both stray hosts; badges → teal/slate distinct; tokens → all four resolve. Gates: node --check x4 inline blocks + sw.js, CSS braces balanced (12 blocks, net delta 0), CRLF preserved, three-stamp .236→.237. NEXT: .238 GEOMETRY TRUTH — model→U-height table replacing the hardcoded `return 8` (John confirmed 8U is CORRECT for the Supermicro SYS-821GE H100/H200 chassis: photo + vendor spec — so the cached Master's 6U GPU pitch is PHYSICALLY IMPOSSIBLE data and the collision is REAL), collision detect + flag (reusing preflight_run's existing occ-map at :43493 rather than standing up a second authority), cross-rack hostname/location mismatch flag. Then reconciliation. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John iPhone) — batch with .235/.236: (1) Forge subtitle reads SITE · SOURCE · SAVED <date> · RESTORED FROM CACHE — never 'LIVE MASTER', never 'STAGE 1 · SCENE PREVIEW'; (2) Forge HUD colors look RIGHT for the first time (tokens alive); (3) racks with RU-less hosts show the gold 'NOT PLACEABLE IN 3D' callout naming them; (4) RACKED/PENDING badges are visibly distinct (teal vs slate); (5) Master tab shows source file + RESTORED FROM CACHE and a 'Purge cache' button; Purge → two confirms naming the file+date → Forge then shows NO MASTER LOADED and the ⊞ picker is empty-safe; (6) ?legacy=1 Master tab has NO purge button and NO provenance text.
